title: Ascension
summary: The record's eschatology — personal and planetary transition to a higher plane, running through fourteen sessions from 2020 to 2025.
markdown:
**Ascension** is where all the record's roads lead: the transition of a person — and
eventually the planet — into a higher plane of existence. Fourteen sessions carry the
doctrine across the whole arc of the archive.

At personal scale it is a count: the February 2020 interviews claim *"1 Million people are
going to go through Ascension, so they will go to a higher dimension of existence."* At
planetary scale it is a process already begun — the December 2023 session declares a
civilization that *"has initiated its ascension... into the higher plane of Earth,"* and
the 2024 election-timeline session frames world events as steering *"toward first contact
and biological energetic ascension on a planetary level."* By December 2025 the record
even assigns it administration: systems *"created to monitor the consciousness and
planetary ascension of the different colony of the Galactic Federation."*

Ascension is the umbrella over the record's whole practice stack: the
[Upgrade](/lore/the-upgrade/) is its mechanism, [DNA activation](/lore/dna-activation/)
its biology, the [Rainbow Light Body](/lore/rainbow-light-body/) its destination, and the
[positive timeline](/lore/positive-timeline/) its road. The claim beneath them all:
the species is mid-promotion.
